post_run_command.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = (data.get('tool_info') or {}).get('command_line', '') or ''
if 'git commit' not in cmd or '--dry-run' in cmd:
    sys.exit(0)
subprocess.Popen(['ssh', 'fedora-local', 'cd ~/apps/tabario/edit-videos && docker compose up --build --no-deps -d video-merger temporal-worker && docker exec video-editor-video-merger-1 python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short'])
"
